title: Light Up LED Space Gun Flashing Toy Black
features: The Flashing Space Gun protects your little galactic warrior from alien hordes – which tend to be found at the bottom of the garden!

Designed to look as futuristic as it gets! With its sleek black design, simply pull the trigger and this pretend pistol lights up, accompanied by the sounds of some advanced technology zapping anything that gets in the way!
Packing five, bright LEDs, the Flashing Space Gun packs three opaque areas, which blaze in a riot of flashing colours.
description: Product description Light Up Led Space Gun Flashing Toy Black Directions Pull the trigger to activate the lights and sounds.
